meta.title: 恋爱和婚姻
meta.description: Intermediate relationship and marriage vocabulary and grammar in Chinese: dating, proposals, and marital challenges.
meta.description_ko: 중국어 초중급~중급 연애·결혼 어휘와 문형: 데이트, 청혼, 결혼 생활의 어려움.

questions.prompt: 「相亲」是什么意思？(What does 相亲 mean?)
「求婚」是什么意思？(What does 求婚 mean?)
「婚姻」是什么意思？(What does 婚姻 mean?)
「离婚」是什么意思？(What does 离婚 mean?)

explanation.en: 「磨合期」(móhéqī) means "adjustment period", when a couple learns to accommodate each other.

questions.prompt: 「磨合期」是什么意思？(What does 磨合期 mean?)
我父母安排我去___，但是我不太想去。(My parents arranged for me to go on a matchmaking date, but I don't really want to go.)
他在浪漫的餐厅向女朋友___，她感动得哭了。(He proposed to his girlfriend at a romantic restaurant, she was so moved she cried.)
幸福的___需要双方共同的努力和理解。(A happy marriage requires effort and understanding from both sides.)
他们结婚十年后，因为性格不合最终___了。(After ten years of marriage, they eventually divorced due to incompatible personalities.)
每对情侣都要经历一段___，才能真正互相了解。(Every couple has to go through an adjustment period before they can truly understand each other.)
虽然他们性格不同，___在一起十年了，感情很好。(Although they have different personalities, they've been together for ten years, with a good relationship.)
婚姻不但需要爱情，___需要责任感和耐心。(Marriage not only needs love, but also needs a sense of responsibility and patience.)
只有真正了解彼此，___能建立稳固的关系。(Only by truly understanding each other can you build a stable relationship.)

explanation.en: 「是〜的」emphasizes the manner: 是通过朋友介绍认识的 = "got to know each other through a friend's introduction".
explanation.ko: 「是〜的」는 방식을 강조하며 '是通过朋友介绍认识的'는 '친구 소개를 통해 알게 되었다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 他们是通过朋友介绍___认识的。(They got to know each other through a friend's introduction.)
结婚以后，两个人需要学会___生活中的小摩擦。(After marriage, two people need to learn to handle small conflicts in daily life.)
很多年轻人现在更___事业，晚一点结婚。(Many young people now emphasize career more, getting married later.)

explanation.en: 「婚姻」means "marriage", fitting the context of long-term relationship maintenance.
explanation.ko: 「婚姻」는 장기적인 관계 유지 맥락에 어울리는 '결혼'을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 良好的沟通是维系___的关键。(Good communication is the key to maintaining a marriage.)
经过一段时间的相处，他们决定___，正式确定关系。(After a period of getting to know each other, they decided to get engaged, formally confirming their relationship.)
这对夫妻已经结婚二十年了，感情依然非常___。(This couple has been married for twenty years, their relationship is still very good.)
婚姻中的信任是最___的部分，一旦破裂很难修复。(Trust in a marriage is the most fundamental part, once broken it's hard to repair.)

explanation.en: The subject 我 (I) must come before 不太想去 (don't really want to go): 我不太想去 (not 不太想我去).
explanation.ko: 주어 '我'는 '不太想去' 앞에 와야 하므로 '我不太想去'가 맞다.

questions.prompt: 我父母安排我去相亲，但是不太想我去。(My parents arranged for me to go on a matchmaking date, but I don't really want to go.) — find the error
choices: 我父母安排我去相亲，但是我不太想去。
我父母安排我去相亲，但是不太想我去。
我父母安排我去相亲，但是我不太去想。
我父母安排我去相亲，但是我想不太去。

explanation.en: 「而且」must come at the start of the second clause, before the verb 需要: 而且需要〜 (not 需要而且〜).
explanation.ko: 「而且」는 두 번째 절의 맨 앞, 동사 '需要' 앞에 와야 하므로 '而且需要〜'가 맞다.

questions.prompt: 婚姻不但需要爱情，需要而且责任感和耐心。(Marriage not only needs love, but also needs a sense of responsibility and patience.) — find the error
choices: 婚姻不但需要爱情，而且需要责任感和耐心。
婚姻不但需要爱情，需要而且责任感和耐心。
婚姻不但需要爱情，而且责任感和耐心需要。
婚姻不但需要爱情，需要责任感而且和耐心。

explanation.en: 「才」must come before 能 (can): 才能建立 (not 能才建立).
explanation.ko: 「才」는 '能' 앞에 와야 하므로 '才能建立'이 맞다.

questions.prompt: 只有真正了解彼此，能才建立稳固的关系。(Only by truly understanding each other can you build a stable relationship.) — find the error
choices: 只有真正了解彼此，才能建立稳固的关系。
只有真正了解彼此，能才建立稳固的关系。
只有真正了解彼此，才建立能稳固的关系。
只有真正了解彼此，能建立才稳固的关系。

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 我父母安排我去相亲，但是我不太想去 ("My parents arranged for me to go on a matchmaking date, but I don't really want to go").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '我父母安排我去相亲，但是我不太想去' (부모님이 맞선을 잡아주셨는데 나는 별로 가고 싶지 않다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 我父母安排我去相亲，__________。(My parents arranged for me to go on a matchmaking date, but I don't really want to go.)

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 婚姻不但需要爱情，而且需要责任感和耐心 ("Marriage not only needs love, but also needs a sense of responsibility and patience").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '婚姻不但需要爱情，而且需要责任感和耐心' (결혼은 사랑뿐만 아니라 책임감과 인내심도 필요하다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 婚姻不但需要爱情，__________责任感和耐心。(Marriage not only needs love, but also needs a sense of responsibility and patience.)
